setup.note: Official Slack-hosted remote MCP server. Slack supports Streamable HTTP at https://mcp.slack.com/mcp, does not support SSE or Dynamic Client Registration, and requires confidential OAuth with a registered Slack app. Only Marketplace-published apps or internal apps may use MCP. Register FlexiGPT's OAuth redirect URL, configure needed user scopes, then enter the Slack Client ID and Client Secret. Reference: https://docs.slack.dev/ai/slack-mcp-server

inputs.label: Slack OAuth Client
inputs.description: Client ID and Client Secret for the Slack app allowed to use Slack MCP.
inputs.note: Slack MCP requires confidential OAuth and does not support Dynamic Client Registration.
